JTEST-128.description: make sure that when we create a worktree, we start from origin/master, so we will not accidentally includes changes from the current master
JTEST-128.claudeResultText:
All 11 tests pass. The new test confirms the existing code already correctly starts worktrees from `origin/master` instead of local `master`.

**What was done:**
- Added a test (`starts from origin/baseBranch, not local branch, when remote has fewer commits`) in `server/src/git/worktree.test.ts` that:
  1. Sets up a bare remote and pushes the initial state
  2. Adds a local commit that is NOT in `origin/main`
  3. Calls `createWorktree` and verifies the worktree does **not** contain the local-only commit
- The existing `resolveStartPoint` logic was already correct — it prefers `origin/baseBranch` over local `baseBranch` when a remote is available

JTEST-130.description: currently, when there are two tasks in progress, one of them is waiting in the queue. instead, the server should process both of the tasks in parrallel. this is the whole point of worktrees.

SCRUM-7.claudeResultText: Added about page overlay triggered by Cmd+E (or Ctrl+E) on the Jira board screen. The overlay shows app name, version, description, keyboard shortcuts reference, and how-it-works section. Closes on Esc or backdrop click. Added E2E Playwright test that confirms the overlay appears and dismisses correctly. PR: https://github.com/Niryo/Jiranimo/pull/9

SCRUM-8.description: add an about page overlay that is presented on the board screen when the user clicks cmd + e
SCRUM-8.claudeResultText: Added about page overlay triggered by ⌘E on the Jira board screen. The overlay shows Jiranimo's tagline, how-it-works steps, keyboard shortcut hint, and a link to the local dashboard. Dismisses on ⌘E again, Escape, outside click, or × button. Includes an E2E Playwright test. PR: https://github.com/Niryo/Jiranimo/pull/10

SCRUM-9.summary: add an about page overlay that is presented on the board screen when the user clicks cmd + e
SCRUM-9.description: add an about page overlay that is presented on the board screen when the user clicks cmd + e
SCRUM-9.claudeResultText: Added an about page overlay to the Jiranimo extension. Pressing Cmd+E (or Ctrl+E) on any Jira board page shows a modal with app info, how-to-use steps, badge state legend, and keyboard shortcuts. The overlay follows the existing board-config modal pattern and dismisses on backdrop click, close button, or Escape. PR: https://github.com/Niryo/Jiranimo/pull/11

SCRUM-10.summary: add an about page overlay that is presented on the board screen when the user clicks cmd + e
SCRUM-10.description: add an about page overlay that is presented on the board screen when the user clicks cmd + e
SCRUM-10.claudeResultText: Added about page overlay to the Jiranimo Chrome extension board screen. Pressing Cmd+E (Mac) / Ctrl+E (Windows/Linux) opens an overlay showing the app name, version, description, and keyboard shortcuts. The overlay closes on Escape or backdrop click. Added CSS animations (fade-in/slide-up) and an E2E Playwright test. PR: https://github.com/Niryo/Jiranimo/pull/12

SCRUM-11.claudeResultText: Added about page overlay triggered by Cmd+E (Mac) / Ctrl+E (Win/Linux) on the board screen. Created AboutOverlay module with show/hide/toggle, CSS animations, keyboard shortcut wiring in content.js, manifest update, and 11 unit tests. All 148 tests pass.

SCRUM-12.summary: add an about page overlay that is presented on the board screen when the user clicks cmd + e
SCRUM-12.description: for this task only, do not run the full e2e tests because they are not working. also, don’t add an e2e test for this becuase it’s not an important flow.
SCRUM-12.screenshotFailReason: This is a Chrome extension content script that only runs on authenticated Jira board pages (*.atlassian.net). The overlay requires the extension to be installed in a real Chrome browser with an active Jira session. There is no dev server, no working E2E tests (explicitly excluded by the task), and no way to trigger the content script outside of a real Jira board. The UI can be verified by installing the extension and pressing Cmd+E on any Jira board.
SCRUM-12.claudeResultText: Added an about page overlay to the Jira board screen triggered by Cmd+E. The overlay shows the Jiranimo logo, description, usage instructions, keyboard shortcuts, and current server URL. It closes on Esc, backdrop click, or the × button. Implemented in content.js and content.css with matching animations and design language. Draft PR: https://github.com/Niryo/Jiranimo/pull/14
